overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Your Claude Code control room — keys, servers and usage at a glance.

configs.title: Configurations
configs.description: Your keyring — Claude accounts and custom API providers in one place. Switch instantly.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Per-project configuration for every folder you've run Claude Code in.

mcp.title: MCP
mcp.description: Global Model Context Protocol servers, available across every project.

agents.title: Agents
agents.description: Sub-agents Claude Code can delegate specialized work to.

commands.title: Commands
commands.description: Custom slash commands available in every Claude Code session.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: Agent Skills Claude Code loads on demand — each a folder with a SKILL.md.

usage.title: Usage
usage.description: Token consumption across all your Claude Code sessions.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Choose when Claude Code should ping you with a system notification.

language.label: Language
language.description: Choose the language Clavis is displayed in.

appearance.label: Appearance
appearance.description: Switch between light and dark themes.

accent.label: Accent
accent.description: The accent color used across the app.

density.label: Density
density.description: How much space rows and cards take up.

launchAtLogin.label: Launch at login
launchAtLogin.description: Start Clavis automatically when you sign in.

support.title: Contact & support
support.description: Found a bug or have feedback? Let us know on GitHub.

dataBackups.title: Data & backups
dataBackups.description: Export your setup to share or move it, import it back, and restore a Claude file from an automatic backup.

export.label: Export configuration
export.description: Save a portable JSON of your providers and preferences.
export.note: No secrets are exported — keys and tokens stay in your vault.

import.label: Import configuration
import.description: Merge providers and preferences from an exported JSON.

backups.label: Backups
backups.description: Snapshots taken automatically before each switch. Newest first.
backups.confirmBody: This overwrites the current {{name}}. The current state is snapshotted first, so you can undo it.

experimental.title: Experimental
experimental.description: Early features that may change or disappear in future versions.
experimental.warning: These settings are unstable. Enable them only if you know what you're doing.

agentTeams.title: Agent Teams
agentTeams.description: Coordinate multiple Claude Code instances working together as a team on a single task.

teammateMode.label: Teammate display mode
teammateMode.description: How teammates are presented while a team is running.
